MicrosoftTeams.IncomingWebhookRequiredErrorMessage: Microsoft Teams Webhook Url cannot be empty.
MicrosoftTeams.ClientIdDescription: Enter your Microsoft Client ID found in the the client application's Overview page. %1$sLearn more%2$s.
MicrosoftTeams.ClientSecretExpiryDateDescription: Optional. Set the expiry date in YYYY-MM-DD format to receive alert on expiry.
MicrosoftTeams.ClientSecretDescription: Enter your Microsoft Client Secret defined in the client application's Certificates and secrets page. Recommended expiry is 24 months. %1$sLearn more%2$s.
MicrosoftTeams.ClientSecretExpiryEmailOwnerExpiredBody:
Hi there,

Your scheduled reports sent to Microsoft Teams will no longer be delivered.

The Microsoft Teams client secret has expired. A Matomo superuser must generate and configure a new client secret to restore the integration.

Please contact your Matomo superuser.

The Matomo Team
MicrosoftTeams.ClientSecretExpiryEmailOwnerFourWeeksBod:
Hi there,

Your scheduled reports sent to Microsoft Teams rely on a client secret that is due to expire on %1$s.

If this secret is not updated, report delivery to Microsoft Teams will discontinue.

Only a Matomo superuser can renew this. We recommend contacting your Matomo superuser to confirm that the client secret will be updated before the expiry date.

The Matomo Team
MicrosoftTeams.ClientSecretExpiryEmailOwnerFourWeeksSub: Microsoft Teams integration expires in 4 weeks
MicrosoftTeams.ClientSecretExpiryEmailOwnerOneWeekBody:
Hi there,

The Microsoft Teams client secret used for your scheduled reports will expire in one week (%1$s).

This will prevent scheduled reports being delivered to Microsoft Teams.

Please contact your Matomo superuser to confirm the update.

The Matomo Team
MicrosoftTeams.ClientSecretExpiryEmailOwnerOneWeekSubje: Final reminder: Microsoft Teams integration expires soon

MicrosoftTeams.ClientSecretExpiryEmailOwnerThreeWeeksSu: Reminder: Microsoft Teams integration may require update
MicrosoftTeams.ClientSecretExpiryEmailOwnerTwoWeeksBody:
Hi there,

The Microsoft Teams client secret used for your scheduled reports will expire on %1$s.

To avoid any interruption, confirm with your Matomo administrator that the client secret will be updated before this date.

The Matomo Team
MicrosoftTeams.ClientSecretExpiryEmailOwnerTwoWeeksSubj: Upcoming expiry: Check Microsoft Teams integration
MicrosoftTeams.ClientSecretExpiryEmailSuperUserExpiredB:
Hi there,

Your Microsoft Teams client secret has now expired.

Matomo can no longer send alerts or scheduled reports to Microsoft Teams.

To restore the integration, generate a new client secret and update your configuration.

The Matomo Team
MicrosoftTeams.ClientSecretExpiryEmailSuperUserExpiredS: Action required: Microsoft Teams client secret has expired
MicrosoftTeams.ClientSecretExpiryEmailSuperUserFourWeek:
Hi there,

Your Microsoft Teams client secret is due to expire on %1$s.

To maintain the connection between Matomo and Microsoft Teams, generate and configure a new client secret before this date.

If the secret expires, Matomo will stop sending alerts and scheduled reports to Microsoft Teams.

We recommend updating the client secret now to avoid disruption.

The Matomo Team
Microsoft Teams client secret expires in 4 weeks

If no action is taken, the integration will stop working after expiry.
